subject: A large canine-like creature heavily overgrown with vines, moss, and fungal growths charges forward through a ruined urban environment
description: A quadrupedal creature — its underlying form resembling a large dog or wolf — is almost entirely consumed by overgrowth: thick vines, pale fungal masses, and green-yellow mossy clusters coat its body. It charges toward the viewer with its mouth open wide, showing teeth. Additional creature tendrils or smaller vine-creatures appear to move with it in the upper areas of the frame. The background shows crumbling stone architecture partially visible through the creature's motion. The palette is sickly green, yellow, and grey.
foreground: vine-and-fungus-covered canine creature charging, mouth open
emotion: feral aggression, unchecked biological growth overtaking form
